arts.ttl: Forget Nico Williams! Jamie Gittens is Europe's HOTTEST young star
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens is the hottest young attacking prospect in European football, with Real Madrid the latest club to be linked with the Borussia Dortmund sensation. Name Club Potential Gabriel Martinelli Arsenal 146.7 Jamie Gittens Dortmund 134.8 Vini Jr Real Madrid 132.1 Jeremy Doku Man City 131.8 Cody Gakpo Liverpool 129.7
